name: @intentsolutionsio/crypto-portfolio-tracker
description: Professional crypto portfolio tracking with real-time prices, PnL analysis, and risk metrics

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install crypto-portfolio-tracker\\n  or /plugin install crypto-portfolio-tracker@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
